channel.title: Praehistorische Zeitschrift
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Praehistorische Zeitschrift

item.title: Titelseiten
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: Life on Pálava Hills in the Urnfield period through the perspective of a metal-detecting survey
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2024-2001

item.title: Not another paper on Lefkandi and Eretria! A communo-centric approach to the creation of collective identities in Lefkandi and Eretria
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2020

item.title: Women – Trade – Cultural Interactions in the Late Iron Age
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2022-2031

item.title: Eine Tonlampe aus Turza Wielka (ehem. Groß Tauersee) in Nordostpolen. Zu römischen Einflüssen auf das Barbaricum und der Deutung ausgewählter Adaptionen
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2024-2011

item.title: Power in Närke. Elite settlement and animal art AD 150–1125 in a Swedish province
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2024-2004

item.title: Living on the edge(s). Settlement revival in the Sacharewo microregion (Białowieża Forest, E Poland) during the Iron Age and Roman Period (1st c. BC/1st c. AD – 5th/6th c. AD)
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2013

item.title: An imperial seal discovered at Argamum, Small Gate Sector (Scythia Minor)
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2032

item.title: Reflections in time: Migration Period mirror recently found east of the Carpathians
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2039

item.title: Mars and Mercury. A golden wolf from Western Poland – a mysterious find
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2022-2063

item.title: Pottery as a witness of commercialization: The case of 9th-century ‘Great Moravia’
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2012

item.title: Gräberfelder der Czarna Hańcza Gruppe. Die Bestattungsbräuche der alten Sudauer
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2031

item.title: Why together? Archaeology and zoology about medieval leather products on the example of Szczecin
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2024-2007

item.title: Forged coins from early medieval settlement centre in Pawłówek on southern border of East Pomerania (northern Poland)
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2045

item.title: Some remarks on studies of Prehistoric craft production from the perspective of Gottfried Semper’s ideas
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2023-2029

item.title: Is it ‘Sus-picious’? Revisiting the Presence of the Wild Boar on the Island of Crete
item.description: Article by Michal Smíšek, Miriam Molnárová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pz-2022-2064
